stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P04 A2 重要区与功能区 cohort

value.user_value: First batch of 10 high-value A2 functional zones (national new areas, free-trade zones, hi-tech parks, development zones), each admitted only for producing INCREMENTAL local-action value beyond central/provincial coverage -- first-line signals (project approvals, procurement, pilots, industry-landing, investment, planning) absent from A0/A1. Each has an A2 pilot profile, a 2016 cursor, and its local-action signal set. A zero-incremental (policy-repost) zone and a media source are rejected.
value.why_it_matters: A2 functional zones are where policy becomes concrete ground action (which project got approved, which tender opened, which pilot launched). That first-line operational signal is exactly what central/provincial policy text does not provide -- the increment that makes the system deep rather than just authoritative.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a selection/pilot task -> 0 cloud cost (recon fetches ran from the dev env).
cost.human_maintenance: incremental-value model + curated zones + reachability recon

deployment: SHADOW (A2 pilot profiles + 2016 cursors + local action signals; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
